data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for a guardian signature for minors.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a guardian signature for minors, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the implementation or validation of this requirement. The absence of any related evidence indicates a gap in meeting this requirement, leading to an inconclusive verdict.
gaps: No evidence of guardian signature for minors being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
